prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via HKS GT-SS turbocharger kit (designed for the 2GR-FKS 3.5L V6, supporting 450whp with stock internals) paired with a Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust manifold and custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe by Fujitsubo

ECU reflash using a Haltech Elite 2500 standalone unit with custom dyno-tuned maps for E85 flex-fuel compatibility, optimized for the 2GR-FKS's direct/port injection hybrid system, including upgraded Denso 12-hole fuel injectors (ID1050x) and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (Kluger-specific valving), complemented by Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear sway bars, polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K), and a Whiteline front strut tower brace (part #KSB738)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody conversion kit (Kluger-specific, 50mm flares) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser by Seibon, finished in Toyota 'Burnt Copper' (3P0) with matte black accents

Rays Volk Racing TE37SL wheels (19x9.5 +30 front, 19x10.5 +35 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear), paired with DBA 5000 Series two-piece rotors and Project Mu B-M4 brake pads

Custom JDM-inspired livery by Rocket Bunny, featuring a 'Kluger RS' badge replacement, LED taillight conversion by VLand (part #VL-TY10-HL), and a carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractors (replica of the Toyota GR HV-R hybrid race car)
